Klasse SyxMessage

java.lang.Object
javax.sound.midi.MidiMessage
javax.sound.midi.SysexMessage
de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class SyxMessage extends SysexMessage implements Serializable
A structured MIDI system exclusive message.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff
Siehe auch:
  • SyxDataStruct
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Feldübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder javax.sound.midi.SysexMessage

    SPECIAL_SYSTEM_EXCLUSIVE, SYSTEM_EXCLUSIVE

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    SyxMessage()
    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
    SyxMessage(SyxDataStruct... parts)
    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
    SyxMessage(String format, byte[] data)
    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
    SyxMessage(String format, byte[] data, int length)
    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
    SyxMessage(String format, SysexMessage sxMsg)
    Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.

    Returns a copy of this SysEx message data content.

    Returns the total length of the system exclusive message in bytes, including the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7).

    Returns a copy of the complete system exclusive message.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • SyxMessage

      public SyxMessage()
      Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.

    • SyxMessage

      public SyxMessage(SyxDataStruct... parts) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
      Parameter:
      parts - System exclusive data struct(s) to add to the message
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if parts contains a SyxChecksum struct and checksum validation of the other part data failed

    • SyxMessage

      public SyxMessage(String format, byte[] data, int length) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
      Parameter:
      format - The message format specifier. The specifier does not include the leading status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the tailing EOX flag (0xF7).
      data - The system exclusive message data including the status byte
      length - The length of the valid message data in the array, including the status byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if format is null or invalid, or if data is null
      InvalidMidiDataException - if data does not match the data format, or if it contains too few or too many bytes

    • SyxMessage

      public SyxMessage(String format, byte[] data) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
      Parameter:
      format - The message format specifier. The specifier does not include the leading status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the tailing EOX flag (0xF7).
      data - The system exclusive message data including the status byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if format is null or invalid, or if data is null
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the status byte is invalid for a system exclusive message, or if data does not match the data format, or if it contains too few or too many bytes

    • SyxMessage

      public SyxMessage(String format, SysexMessage sxMsg) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Creates a new structured MIDI system exclusive message.
      Parameter:
      format - The message format specifier. The specifier does not include the leading status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the tailing EOX flag (0xF7).
      sxMsg - A SysexMessage to copy the message data from
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if format is null or invalid, or if sxMsg is null
      InvalidMidiDataException - if sxMsg.getData() does not match the data format, or if it contains too few bytes

  • Methodendetails

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears this message (remove parts and parameter map).

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets all parameters to their default values.

    • copy

      public void copy(SyxMessage other) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Makes a shallow copy of another message.
      Parameter:
      other - The other message
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the argument is null

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Determines whether this message is empty. A message is empty iff there are no parts.

    • addParts

      public void addParts(SyxDataStruct... parts) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Adds system exclusive data structs to this message.

      Note: If you use parameter information, invoke this method after adding those to the parts! Not doing so results in the parts' parameters missing in the parameter UID map. A correct implementation looks like this:

       SyxDataStruct myPart = new SyxDataStruct(...);
 myPart.addParamInfo(...);
 ... 
 myPart.addParamInfo(...);
 addParts(myPart);
      Parameter:
      parts - System exclusive data struct(s) to add to the message
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if parts contains invalid MIDI data

    • getParts

      public SyxDataStruct[] getParts()
      Returns all parts of this message.
      Gibt zurück:
      An array containing the parts, may be empty. Changes made to elements of the array will modify this message's data content.

    • getPart

      public SyxDataStruct getPart(int index) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Gets a message part.
      Parameter:
      index - The zero-based index
      Gibt zurück:
      The part, changes made will be effective in this message
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if index is out of range

    • getPart

      public SyxDataStruct getPart(String name) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Gets a message part.
      Parameter:
      name - The part name. If there are multiple parts with the same name, the method will return the first of them.
      Gibt zurück:
      The part, changes made will be effective in this message
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if name is null, or if no part with this name exists

    • validateChecksum

      public void validateChecksum() throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Validates the message's checksum if present. Should be invoked when initializing this system exclusive message from received data.
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the checksum contained in the message does not equal the checksum computed from the message's data.

    • updateChecksum

      public void updateChecksum()
      Updates the message's checksum if present. Should be invoked before sending this system exclusive message to a hardware instrument.

    • getParamUIDs

      public String[] getParamUIDs()
      Returns an array containing all unique parameter names (UIDs) in this message. The returned array may be empty.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

    • findParamUID

      public String findParamUID(String UID)
      Finds a parameter.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Gibt zurück:
      UID if a parameter with this unique name exist, null otherwise

    • findParamUIDs

      public String[] findParamUIDs(String regex) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Finds parameters and returns an array of the respective unique parameter names.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      regex - A regular expression specifying the unique parameter name(s) to search for
      Gibt zurück:
      A string array; may be empty if no matching parameters were found
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the argument is null, or empty, or not a valid regular expression
      Siehe auch:
      • findParamUIDsSimple(String)

    • findParamUIDsSimple

      public String[] findParamUIDsSimple(String pattern)
      Finds parameters and returns an array of the respective unique parameter names.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      pattern - A simplified pattern specifying the unique parameter name(s) to search for, one of the following:
      • "*" or "**" to list all parameters, or
      • a unique parameter name with wildcards
        • "*" matching any sequence of characters except '.'
        • "**" matching any sequence of characters including '.'
      Gibt zurück:
      A string array; may be empty if no matching parameters were found
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the argument is null or empty
      Siehe auch:
      • findParamUIDs(String)

    • findParam

      public SyxParamInfo findParam(String UID)
      Finds a parameter and returns the respective parameter information.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Gibt zurück:
      The parameter information or null if no such parameter exists

    • getParamInfo

      public SyxParamInfo getParamInfo(String UID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns parameter information for a unique parameter name (UID).

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Gibt zurück:
      The parameter information
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - If there is no parameter named UID in this message

    • findParams

      public SyxParamInfo[] findParams(String regex)
      Finds parameters and returns an array of the respective parameter information objects.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      regex - A regular expression specifying the unique parameter name(s) to search for
      Gibt zurück:
      An array of SyxParamInfos; may be empty if no matching parameters were found
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the argument is null, or empty, or not a valid regular expression
      Siehe auch:
      • findParamsSimple(String)

    • findParamsSimple

      public SyxParamInfo[] findParamsSimple(String pattern)
      Finds parameters and returns an array of the respective parameter information objects.

      Note: In order to use unique parameter names, parameter information must be added to all parts.

      Parameter:
      pattern - A simplified pattern specifying the unique parameter name(s) to search for, one of the following:
      • "*" or "**" to list all parameters, or
      • a unique parameter name with wildcards
        • "*" matching any sequence of characters except '.'
        • "**" matching any sequence of characters including '.'
      Gibt zurück:
      An array of SyxParamInfos; may be empty if no matching parameters were found
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the argument is null or empty
      Siehe auch:
      • findParams(String)

    • getMidiValue

      public int getMidiValue(String UID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns the MIDI value of a parameter.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message
      InvalidMidiDataException - if validation of the retrieved MIDI value failed

    • setMidiValue

      public void setMidiValue(String UID, int midiValue) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Sets the MIDI value of a parameter.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      midiValue - The MIDI value
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message
      InvalidMidiDataException - if midiValue is not permissible

    • getModelValue

      public int getModelValue(String UID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns the model value of a parameter.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message

    • getModelValueAsString

      public String getModelValueAsString(String UID) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a string representation of the model value of a parameter.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message

    • readString

      public String readString(String UIDpfx) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Reads several parameters as a string.

      The method first invokes findParamsSimple(UIDpfx+"**") to determine the list of parameters to read and then gets these parameters one-by-one and writes their character values into the returned string

      Parameter:
      UIDpfx - The common prefix of the unique names of the parameters to write
      Gibt zurück:
      string The read string
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if UIDpfx is null or empty, or if no parameters with the UID prefix UIDpfx were found
      InvalidMidiDataException - if conversion of parameter values to characters failed

    • setModelValue

      public void setModelValue(String UID, int modelValue) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Sets the model value of a parameter.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      modelValue - The model value
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message
      InvalidMidiDataException - if modelValue is not permissible

    • setModelValue

      public void setModelValue(String UID, String valueName) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Sets the model value of a parameter from a value name.
      Parameter:
      UID - The unique parameter name
      valueName - A string representation of the model value
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no parameter named UID in this message
      InvalidMidiDataException - if modelValue is not permissible

    • writeString

      public void writeString(String UIDpfx, String string, boolean lenient) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Writes a string into several parameters.

      The method first invokes findParamsSimple(UIDpfx+"**") to determine the list of parameters to write and then sets these parameters one-by-one to the characters of string.

      Parameter:
      UIDpfx - The common prefix of the unique names of the parameters to write
      string - The string to write
      lenient - if true, excess characters in string will be ignored and missing characters will be replaced by spaces; if false, the number of characters in string must equal the size of the UID list returned by findParamsSimple(UIDpfx+"**")
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if
      • UIDpfx is null or empty, or
      • no parameters with the UID prefix UIDpfx were found, or
      • if lenient is false and string is null or contains a wrong number of characters.
      InvalidMidiDataException - if parameter setting failed

    • validate

      public void validate() throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Validates the current values of all parameters.
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if validation fails

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(byte[] data, int length) throws IllegalArgumentException, InvalidMidiDataException
      Sets the data of this system exclusive message.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      setMessage in Klasse SysexMessage
      Parameter:
      data - The system exclusive message data, including the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7). The end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7) at the end of data is optional. If missing, EOX will be appended automatically.
      length - The length of the valid message data in the array, including the status byte
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if data is null
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the first byte is not a valid status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7), or if data does not match the data format (see getParts())

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(int status, byte[] data, int length) throws InvalidMidiDataException
      Sets the data of this system exclusive message.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      setMessage in Klasse SysexMessage
      Parameter:
      status - The SysEx status byte for the message (0xF0 or 0xF7)
      data - The system exclusive message data, excluding the status byte. The end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7) at the end of data is optional. If missing, EOX will be appended automatically.
      length - The length of the valid message data in the array
      Löst aus:
      InvalidMidiDataException - if the status is not a valid status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7), or if data does not match the data format

    • getData

      public byte[] getData()
      Returns a copy of this SysEx message data content. The returned array of bytes does neither include the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7), nor the end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7).
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getData in Klasse SysexMessage

    • clone

      public Object clone()
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      clone in Klasse SysexMessage

    • getLength

      public int getLength()
      Returns the total length of the system exclusive message in bytes, including the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) and the end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7).
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getLength in Klasse MidiMessage

    • getMessage

      public byte[] getMessage()
      Returns a copy of the complete system exclusive message. The first byte of the returned byte array is the status byte of the message (0xF0 or 0xF7). The subsequent bytes are message data bytes as returned by getData(). The last byte is the end-of-exclusive byte (EOX, 0xF7).
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getMessage in Klasse MidiMessage
      Gibt zurück:
      The complete message data.

    • getStatus

      public int getStatus()
      Returns the status byte (0xF0 or 0xF7) of the system exclusive message.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      getStatus in Klasse MidiMessage

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      equals in Klasse Object

    • prettyPrint

      public String prettyPrint(long timeStamp)
      Pretty-prints this message into a string.
      Parameter:
      timeStamp - The message's time stamp, negative if unknown
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string

    • prettyPrint

      public String prettyPrint()
      Pretty-prints this message into a string.
      Gibt zurück:
      The printed string
